title: Welcome to your Alumni community
excerpt: Welcome to your alumni community With over 500,000 alumni across the globe, you're part of a vibrant network. Reconnect, grow your career, and get involved in events. Explore volunteer and mentor opportunities, and discover initiatives that strengthen your bond with the University and fellow graduates.

title: Alumni benefits
excerpt: Alumni benefits Exclusive discounts and opportunities for our alumni community The University of Melbourne offers its alumni community a range of exclusive benefits.

title: Get involved as an alumnus
excerpt: Get involved as an alumnus Use your experience to support our communityAs a member of the University of Melbourne's alumni community, you have the power to make a real difference. Whether you're keen to mentor the next generation of graduates, share your expertise, or support our students financially.

title: Stay connected as an alumni
excerpt: Stay connected as an alumni Connect, contribute and make your mark Whether it's reconnecting with your college friends, being inspired by stories from alumni who've made their mark, or celebrating at a local event, there's something for everyone in the alumni community.

title: Alumni support and resources
excerpt: Alumni support and resources Resources for professional growth and successThere is a wealth of information and resources available for you to tap into, and we're here to help you find what you need.

title: Welcome new alumni
excerpt: Welcome new alumni and graduates Congratulations on joining this talented, diverse community who are creating a brighter future from every corner of the world. As a University of Melbourne graduate, your vibrant alumni community can continue to be a source of joy, connection and direction at every step.

title: Lifestyle benefits for alumni
excerpt: Lifestyle benefits for alumni Benefits to enrich your lifeAlumni enjoy access to a variety of special rates and benefits to help them get the most out of life in Melbourne – and beyond.

title: Professional development benefits for alumni
excerpt: Professional development benefits for alumni Advance your career with exclusive alumni benefitsAlumni can access a range of resources and benefits for professional development.

excerpt: University access benefits for alumni Keep connected to the University community Alumni enjoy special access to University facilities and services.

title: Volunteering as an alumnus
excerpt: Volunteering as an alumnus Use your expertise to give back to the University community Each alumnus has a unique set of skills and experiences to offer. There are many ways you can use these to make a meaningful contribution to the University community.

title: Volunteering as an alumnus
excerpt: Volunteering as an alumnus Use your expertise to give back to the University community.

title: Find an alumni group
excerpt: Find an alumni group Find your alumni group Connect with alumni near you – or with others who share your professional or personal interests. Find your group and join through the portal below.

excerpt: India Alumni Network India Alumni Network. About The University launched the India Alumni Network in 2023. Our Network volunteers act as valuable points of contact within key regions for the University.

title: Alumni global community
excerpt: Alumni global community Stay connected wherever you are With over 500,000 alumni from 180 countries, our community spans the globe. Stay connected with us and other alumni in your area through chapters, national networks, discipline networks, and social media.

title: Profile: Dorothy Hill AC - Global Alumni Award winner
excerpt: Profile: Dorothy Hill AC - Global Alumni Award winner Dorothy Hill AC was a geologist who blazed a trail for women in science and higher education. She was the first woman to hold a personal chair at an Australian university.

title: How cultural immersion is helping an international alum succeed
excerpt: How cultural immersion is helping an international alum succeed Thuy Tran's story is one of remarkable transformation, a testament to the power of cultural immersion and the value of international experience. Growing up in Vietnam, she harboured a dream to work and live abroad.

title: Meet the UniMelb graduate, Managing Director of Broadspectrum
excerpt: Meet the UniMelb graduate, Managing Director of Broadspectrum Ivan Chadwick has one of the most complex jobs in Australia: managing 6,500 people across some of Australia's most critical infrastructure projects. He has built a career that has taken him from UniMelb's Faculty of Engineering to the very top.

title: Sal Balharrie – an alumna on her own terms
excerpt: Sal Balharrie – an alumna on her own terms Sal Balharrie's career has been shaped by her own rules. Starting out as a graduate in finance, she pivoted into technology and then into a leadership role driving responsible AI at Telstra.
